examples: As I wend to the shores I know not.
Then he drowned and he wend to heaven.
I tried to wend the cat away from my room.
As these cases wend their way through court, interest has been accruing at special penalty rates.
We wend somewhat dreamily through the Ciutat Vella (old town), landing on decidedly curious Bodegas Baviera (40 Calle Corregeria).
